Latest published

Legal & Arbitration · SRA Transparency Rules 2018

Why Your Law Firm's SRA Transparency Page Is Probably Non-Compliant in 2026

SRA Code Rules 8.7 and 8.9 require specific fee, complaints and regulatory information on every solicitor's website. Most still miss the same five items. Here is the audit checklist.

6 min read Read →
Hotels and Hospitality · Schema · GBP · Booking economics

How One Asia Pacific Hotel Group Replaced 83% of OTA Dependency in Six Months

Anonymised case-study walk-through of the campaign behind 840% organic-user growth and a 113% revenue YoY shift. Direct-booking unit economics at scale.

7 min read Read →
Real Estate, Finance & IPOs · SEC Reg FD · FCA Listing Rules

SEC Regulation FD and the Pre-IPO Digital Footprint: A Checklist for 2026 Listings

Pre-IPO content protocol for listings on NYSE, Nasdaq, LSE Main Market, and DFM. The 18-month digital-footprint timeline that produces zero-incident outcomes.
